product_name: Union Bank of India Education Loan
tagline: Union Education — India Studies, India Grows

schemes.collateral: Up to ₹7.5 Lakh — no collateral. Above ₹7.5L — collateral/guarantee required
Up to ₹7.5 Lakh — no collateral. Above ₹7.5L — property/collateral required

schemes.for: Apply via Govt portal — single application to multiple banks
Students at Top 100 NIRF ranked institutes

concessions.category: Simple interest during moratorium (if paid timely)

domestic: Graduation / Post-graduation (Arts, Science, Commerce, Engineering, Medical, Law, MBA)
abroad: Regular degree programs at reputed universities

student.admission: Confirmed admission proof compulsory (offer letter / admission letter)

eligibility.co_applicant: Parent / Guardian / Spouse / Sibling — mandatory as co-borrower

collateral_rules.upto_4_lakh: No collateral, no margin. Parent/Guardian as co-borrower
collateral_rules.4_lakh_to_7_5_lakh: No collateral. Third party guarantee OR parent as co-borrower
collateral_rules.above_7_5_lakh: Tangible collateral — property, NSC, LIC policy, FD etc.

moratorium_period.definition: Course duration + 1 year (or 6 months after getting a job — whichever is earlier)
moratorium_period.during_moratorium: Interest payment is optional (simple interest) — if paid, a 1% concession is given

repayment.emi_start: EMI starts after the moratorium period ends

subsidy_schemes.name: Central Sector Interest Subsidy (CSIS)
subsidy_schemes.for: EWS students — family income below ₹4.5 Lakh
subsidy_schemes.benefit: Full interest during moratorium period is paid by the government

student: Admission letter / offer letter from institute

process_steps.title: Course & Institute Verification
process_steps.step_text_hindi: प्रवेश पत्र देखें और जाँचें कि संस्था बैंक की अनुमोदित सूची में शामिल है या नहीं।
process_steps.detail: Check admission letter and verify if the institute is on the bank's approved list

process_steps.title: Loan Amount Calculation
process_steps.step_text_hindi: शुल्क ढांचा और खर्चे जोड़कर कुल ऋण राशि तय करें। ग्राहक कितना मार्जिन मनी देगा।
process_steps.detail: Fee structure + expenses = total loan. How much margin money will the student contribute?

process_steps.title: Collateral Decision
process_steps.step_text_hindi: ₹7.5 लाख से अधिक ऋण के लिए संपार्श्विक आवश्यक है। संपत्ति के कागजात तैयार रखें।
process_steps.detail: If loan exceeds ₹7.5 Lakh, confirm collateral availability.

process_steps.title: Document Collection
process_steps.step_text_hindi: छात्र और सह-आवेदक सभी आवश्यक दस्तावेज़ एकत्र करें।
process_steps.detail: Collect all required documents from student and co-applicant

process_steps.title: Application & Sanction
process_steps.step_text_hindi: आवेदन जमा करें, सत्यापन के बाद स्वीकृति पत्र जारी होगा।
process_steps.detail: Submit application, sanction letter issued after verification

process_steps.title: Loan Disbursement
process_steps.step_text_hindi: शुल्क सीधे संस्था के खाते में और अन्य खर्चे छात्र के खाते में जमा किए जाएंगे।
process_steps.detail: Fee credited directly to institute's account, other expenses to student's account

staff_tips: First check the admission letter — loan cannot be sanctioned without confirmed admission
PM Vidyalaxmi scheme 2024 is new — 3% subvention for Top 100 NIRF institutes
If the student is female, mention the 0.50% rate concession
Paying interest during moratorium gives a 1% extra concession — explain this to the customer
For abroad studies, ensure the passport is valid — advise early application
